data.title: [RED] Write dogfooding validation test for simplify-first behavioral preconditions
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Build
Create tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh — a bash test that verifies the structural preconditions for sc-6 behavioral change (dogfooding validation). Follows the pattern of test-value-effort-scorer-integration.sh: section headers (=== test_name ===), PASS/FAIL counters, grep assertions against brainstorm/SKILL.md.

## Test Sections and Assertions

### Section: test_phase1_scale_evidence_step
- Given: brainstorm/SKILL.md updated by task 8f37-ddb2 to add scale_context to planning-intelligence log definition
- When: test greps brainstorm/SKILL.md for "scale_context" in the planning-intelligence log section
- Then: PASS; Before 8f37-ddb2 completes → FAIL (RED)
- Assertion: grep -q "scale_context" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

### Section: test_phase2_simple_baseline_requirement
- Given: brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 2 updated by task a0ae-d68c to require a simple baseline option
- When: test greps brainstorm/SKILL.md for simple baseline requirement language
- Then: PASS; Before a0ae-d68c completes → FAIL (RED)
- Assertion: grep -qi "simple baseline" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

### Section: test_phase2_evidence_citation_gate
- Given: brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 2 updated by a0ae-d68c to require GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT for complex proposals
- When: test greps brainstorm/SKILL.md for GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT requirement language
- Then: PASS; Before a0ae-d68c completes → FAIL (RED)
- Assertion: grep -q "GATE/CHECKED/FINDING/VERDICT" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

## .test-index Update (required before committing this task)
Add RED markers:
```
[test_phase1_scale_evidence_step] plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh
[test_phase2_simple_baseline_requirement] plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh
[test_phase2_evidence_citation_gate] plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh
```
Verify: grep '\[test_phase1_scale_evidence_step\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

NOTE: This task cannot turn GREEN until the full upstream dependency chain is complete (651c-652f -> 334f-f7ab -> 8f37-ddb2 for Phase 1; 8307-3cd0 -> 9232-2ed2 -> a0ae-d68c for Phase 2). The declared depends_on edges handle this transitively.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x applied immediately after creation)
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh
- [ ] Running the test against the current codebase exits 1 (RED — assertions fail because Phase 1/Phase 2 SKILL.md changes not yet made)
  Verify: ! bash tests/skills/test-dogfooding-simplify-first.sh
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_phase1_scale_evidence_step]
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase1_scale_evidence_step\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_phase2_simple_baseline_requirement]
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase2_simple_baseline_requirement\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_phase2_evidence_citation_gate]
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase2_evidence_citation_gate\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
